acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Issue and IssueSummary include namespace in JSON output
- [ ] All query results populate namespace based on read namespace
- [ ] Existing query tests updated for new field
description:
**Problem**
REALTIME_PLAN requires namespace exposure in issue summaries and issue views. API types Issue/IssueSummary lack namespace, so clients can’t distinguish multi-namespace data.

**Design**
Add `namespace` field (NamespaceId or string) to Issue and IssueSummary in src/api/mod.rs. Update Issue::from_bead and IssueSummary::from_bead to take namespace context (or add new constructors) and update query executor call sites to pass the read namespace. Update IssueSummary::from_issue to copy namespace.

**Files**
- src/api/mod.rs
- src/daemon/query_executor.rs
title: Expose namespace in Issue and IssueSummary API

description: bd-q6o7 made rebuild_index reject forward gaps with WalReplayError::NonContiguousSeq. Integration test crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/repl/range.rs:wal_range_reader_rejects_internal_gap still expects rebuild success and now fails in cargo test/cargo test --features slow-tests. Update fixture/assertions to reflect hard-cutover replay semantics.
title: Update repl::range::wal_range_reader_rejects_internal_gap for replay hard-cutover

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] `crates/beads-bootstrap` exists and is wired into the workspace/DAG policy
- [ ] Pure path helpers move out of `beads-cli`
- [ ] `beads-rs` and `beads-daemon` consume bootstrap-owned path helpers instead of duplicating them
- [ ] `crates/beads-cli/src/paths.rs` is deleted or reduced to a thin temporary wrapper removed before closeout
- [ ] `cargo test -p beads-bootstrap` passes
description:
**Problem**
Pure path/bootstrap ownership is currently split across three places:
- `crates/beads-cli/src/paths.rs` owns reusable pure path helpers
- `crates/beads-rs/src/paths.rs` owns config-driven override state and test override wiring
- `crates/beads-daemon/src/paths.rs` duplicates similar state and path derivation

That means the current path story is both mis-owned and duplicated.

**Where**
- `crates/beads-cli/src/paths.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/src/paths.rs`
- `crates/beads-daemon/src/paths.rs`
- workspace root `Cargo.toml`
- `docs/CRATE_DAG.md`
- `lints/beads_lints/tests/crate_dag_policy.rs`

**Why It Matters**
Path resolution is bootstrap ownership, not CLI language ownership and not daemon-local policy. Until it has a single owner, later config and repo extraction work will keep tripping over duplicate helpers and override state.

**Files to Study**
- `crates/beads-cli/src/paths.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/src/paths.rs`
- `crates/beads-daemon/src/paths.rs`
- `crates/beads-git/src/paths.rs`
- `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-13-final-crate-boundary-cleanup.md`
design: Create `crates/beads-bootstrap` as a pure bootstrap owner crate and move path resolution into it. Keep `beads-bootstrap` pure: it should not call into `beads-surface`, `beads-git`, or `beads-daemon`. Side-effectful override propagation into those crates should stay at the assembly/daemon layer until later cleanup can remove the need.
title: Create beads-bootstrap crate and move pure path helpers out of beads-cli
